description: Multi-turn: list execution history -> inspect latest execution (covers `neomind agent executions` + `agent latest-execution`; observability core, previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: How many times has demo-agent executed recently, and what were the statuses?
Show me the details of its most recent execution.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent resolves demo-agent's id then runs `neomind agent executions <id>` (or GET /api/agents/<id>/executions)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind agent latest-execution <id>` (or executions --limit 1)
expectations.overall: Empty history is a valid answer, but must be grounded in tool results
